reference: In my opinion, if there is involvement of the epidural layer of the spinal cord, the disease can spread into the brain, and the seizures will occur. You need to consult with a neurologist who can assess the extent of the condition and treat it accordingly.
text: In my opinion, if there is involvement of the epidural layer of the spinal cord, the disease can spread into the brain, and the seizures will occur. You need to consult with a neurologist who can assess the extent of the condition and treat it accordingly.
